mapper.select: select s.id, s.settlement_no, s.order_id, o.order_no, s.user_id, u.real_name as user_name, s.instrument_id, i.instrument_name, o.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, s.bill_type, s.estimated_amount, s.discount_amount, s.final_amount, s.settle_status, s.create_time, s.settled_time, s.operator_user_id, op.real_name as operator_name, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.settlement_status from biz_settlement_record s left join biz_reservation_order o on o.id = s.order_id left join sys_user u on u.id = s.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = s.instrument_id left join sys_department d on d.id = o.department_id left join sys_user op on op.id = s.operator_user_id where s.id = #{id} and o.department_id = #{scopeDepartmentId} limit 1
